## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or console logs to help explain the problem.

```
Paste console logs here
```

## Environment

- **Chrome Version**: [e.g., 120.0.6099.109]
- **Extension Version**: [e.g., 1.0.1]
- **ePuskesmas URL**: [e.g., kotakediri.epuskesmas.id]
- **Page Type**: [anamnesa / diagnosa / resep]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia]

## Clinical Impact

<!-- IMPORTANT: If this bug could affect patient safety, mark it as CRITICAL -->
- [ ] This bug could affect patient safety (mark as CRITICAL)
- [ ] This bug affects clinical data accuracy
- [ ] This bug affects auto-fill functionality
- [ ] This bug is cosmetic/UI only

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
